zh.lifeSummary: 當Luke Hitchcock於1614年7月1日出生在英國瓦維其可爾分尼 康普頓時，他的父親John Hitchcock28歲，母親Mary Franklin24歲。他於1641年10月2日與Elizabeth Gibbons在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德被列為shoemaker。他去世於1659年11月1日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德享年45歲，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德維利亞 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Luke Hitchcock于1614年7月1日出生在英国瓦維其可爾分尼 康普頓时，他的父亲John Hitchcock28岁，母亲Mary Franklin24岁。他于1641年10月2日与Elizabeth Gibbons在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德被列为shoemaker。他去世于1659年11月1日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德享年45岁，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德維利亞 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Hitchcock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from a pet form of the Middle English personal name Hitch , a pet form of Richard , with the Middle English diminutive suffix -cok. Compare Heacock .

variants.name: Hitch
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Hich, a rhyming pet form of Richard. Compare Hick .

variants.name: Hedgecoth
meanings: English: variant of   Hitchcock  . Compare   Hedgecock  .

variants.name: Hedgecock
meanings: English (southeastern): variant of   Hitchcock  , altered by folk etymology.

nameMeanings.name: Luke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Middle English vernacular form of Lucas , Latin form of the post-classical Greek name Loukas ‘man from Lucania’. This owes its perennial popularity throughout Christian Europe to the fact that, from the 2nd century onwards, the third gospel in the New Testament has been ascribed to the Lucas or Luke mentioned at various places in Acts and in the Epistles. Little is known about him beyond the facts that he was a doctor, a Gentile, and a friend and convert of St Paul. The name was borne by the character Luke Skywalker in the film Star Wars ( 1977 ), and rose sharply in popularity in the 1990s.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."
On April 24, 1638, a company of five-hundred English Puritans led by the Reverend John Davenport and Theophilus Eaton, a wealthy London merchant, sailed into the harbor.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Luke Hitchcock was born on 1 July 1614, in Fenny Compton, Warwickshire, England, his father, John Hitchcock, was 28 and his mother, Mary Franklin, was 24. He married Elizabeth Gibbons on 2 October 1641, in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. His occupation is listed as shoemaker in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. He died on 1 November 1659, in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 45, and was buried in Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Luke Hitchcock est né le 1 juillet 1614, à Fenny Compton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, John Hitchcock, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Mary Franklin, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Gibbons le 2 octobre 1641, à Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Sa profession de son indiquée est shoemaker à Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Il est décédé le 1 novembre 1659, à Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Luke Hitchcock am 1. Juli 1614 in Fenny Compton, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Hitchcock 28 und seine Mutter Mary Franklin 24. Er hat am 2. Oktober 1641 in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America Elizabeth Gibbons geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. sein Beruf ist als shoemaker in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America aufgeführt. Er starb am 1. November 1659 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Luke Hitchcock è nato il il 1 luglio 1614 nel Fenny Compton, Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, John Hitchcock, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Mary Franklin, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Gibbons il 2 ottobre 1641, nel Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. La sua occupazione è indicata come shoemaker nel Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Morì il 1 novembre 1659, nel Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Luke Hitchcockが1614年7月1日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアフエニー コンプトンで生まれた時，父John Hitchcockは28歳，母Mary Franklinは24歳であった。1641年10月2日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドでElizabeth Gibbonsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。イギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドでの職業はshoemakerと記録されている。彼は1659年11月1日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドで45歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドヴィラッジ セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Luke Hitchcock(이)가 1614년 7월 1일 영국 워윅실르 펜이 콤프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Hitchcock(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Franklin(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1641년 10월 2일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드에서 Elizabeth Gibbons(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드에서 shoemaker이었다. 그는 1659년 11월 1일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드 비라지 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Luke Hitchcock nasceu em 1 de julho de 1614, em Fenny Compton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Hitchcock, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Mary Franklin, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Gibbons em 2 de outubro de 1641, em Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Sua profissão aparece como shoemaker em Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Ele faleceu em 1 de novembro de 1659, em Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Luke Hitchcock родился 1 июля 1614 г. в местности фенни комптон, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Hitchcock было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Franklin, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Gibbons 2 октября 1641 г. в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь.  Он работал по профессии shoemaker в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. Он умер 1 ноября 1659 г. в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности вилладж кеметири, ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Luke Hitchcock nació el 1 de julio de 1614, en Fenny Compton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Hitchcock, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Mary Franklin, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Gibbons el 2 de octubre de 1641, en Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Su ocupación registrada era shoemaker en Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Murió el 1 de noviembre de 1659, en Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Estados Unidos.
